prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan CA18DET (1.8L turbocharged inline-4, 170-200hp stock) with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, Tomei 260° cams, and N1 oil pump for high-RPM reliability
Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 50mm wastegate dump tube and a custom 4-2-1 header by JUN Auto for optimized turbo spool
Haltech Elite 1500 standalone ECU with custom CA18DET base map, paired with a set of ID1000 fuel injectors, Walbro 255lph fuel pump, and a custom aluminum radiator by Koyorad for heat management
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Stanza-specific fitment) with custom carbon fiber overfenders and a 2-inch extended wheelbase for aggressive stance
Custom 17x9.5-inch Work Meister S1 3P wheels in gunmetal finish with 225/45R17 Toyo R888R tires, paired with Tein Flex Z coilovers with 20mm extended lower mounts for proper fender clearance

Full custom aero package including a Veilside Fortune front bumper (modified for Stanza fitment), a custom carbon fiber duckbill spoiler by Seibon, and a set of JDM-spec Nissan Stanza FX rear quarter window vents for heat extraction
